Interface OpenApiLink

All Superinterfaces:
Link, Node, Visitable
All Known Subinterfaces:
OpenApi30Link, OpenApi31Link, OpenApi32Link, OpenApi3xLink
All Known Implementing Classes:
OpenApi30LinkImpl, OpenApi31LinkImpl, OpenApi32LinkImpl
public interface OpenApiLink extends Link
